description: A young male adventurer at the very start of his journey, before he has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how he looks before any equipment is picked up, stripped down to only the base layer worn beneath armor. Extremely tough, self-assured and powerfully confident, with a fierce, determined expression and a commanding, unshakable posture. Sharp intense eyes, tousled dark brown hair, and a lean, athletic, muscular build that shows real strength and agility. His stance is grounded, strong and self-assured — shoulders back, chin level, radiating quiet badass energy. He wears ONLY the plain, simple base-layer underclothes worn beneath armor — a modest basic cloth undershirt or bare chest with simple linen undershorts or short braies — muted and understated, strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful; not casual modern clothes, not jeans, not a t-shirt. Modest and practical, not sexualized, not a costume. He has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. He still looks cool, memorable, capable and genuinely badass through his fierce determined face, dark brown hair and commanding posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
